SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOURMET CATERING LLC DBA PASTA PARADISO KONEN, PAUL $735.61 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $820.61, DEFENDANT'S NOT PRESENT.
